# UX Spec: <feature / flow>

> Owner: **UX Designer** · Consumed by UI Designer and engineers. Part of gate 2 (Design → Build).

## User goals
What the user is trying to accomplish in this flow.

## Information architecture
Screens/states and how they relate; navigation model.

## Flows
Step-by-step happy path + key alternate/error paths. (Link wireframes if any.)

```
[entry] → [step 1] → [step 2] → [success]
                   ↘ [error state]
```

## Interaction & states
Behaviour of key elements; empty / loading / error / success states.

## Accessibility
Keyboard nav, focus order, contrast, screen-reader expectations, target WCAG level.

- [ ] …
